LightningComponentBundle.description: Displays an alert on page load when recent WARN, ERROR or FATAL log events exist in the log archive.

property.name: lookbackHours
property.label: Lookback Hours
property.description: Number of hours to look back in the log archive for recent log events

property.name: logLevels
property.label: Log Levels
property.description: Comma-separated list of log levels to alert on (e.g. WARN,ERROR,FATAL)
